reviews.comment:
Nos pasaron dos veces la tarjeta de crédito y no nos dan resultados a los reclamos, una vergüenza que sean parte de la red ACA

Edit: el encargado llamó y nos informó que solucionaron que la tarjeta reconocía una sola carga. Ahora estamos a la espera del reintegro por parte de TARJETA NARANJA.

(Translated by Google)
Our credit card was charged twice and our complaints are ignored. It's a disgrace that they're part of the ACA network.

Edit: The manager called and informed us that they fixed the issue where the card was only recognizing one charge. We're now waiting for a refund from Tarjeta Naranja.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11189743280620158761/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJNmZPc1hnEAE
